extracted_information: AgeVerif offers a free, fast, and easy age verification integration solution designed to help websites comply with regulatory requirements and protect minors from age-restricted content. It provides various verification methods, some of which are free, and focuses on privacy (e.g., double anonymity) and a fluid user experience.

specifications.security: Bank-level 256-bit SSL encryption for all exchanged information.
specifications.integration_time: As little as 5 minutes with a single line of code.
specifications.authentication: Users register proof of age in an AgeVerif account secured with a Passkey for quick re-authentication on other AgeVerif-integrated sites.
specifications.data_privacy: AgeVerif does not use visitor data for commercial purposes (emailing, resale, rental, sharing). Verified users are not associated with specific requesting sites.

pricing.basis: Charged per user who successfully completes verification.

features: Simplified age verification for websites.
Free solution to verify and estimate visitor age.
Helps comply with regulatory requirements.
Protects businesses and online activities.
Transparent and secure age verification methods.
Prioritizes user data privacy and user experience fluidity.
Wide range of free and paid verification methods available.
AI-powered biometric analysis.
Double-anonymous age estimation via third-party application.
Age estimation by email address.
Double anonymity identity verification via a third-party application.
Micro transaction by 3D Secure credit card.
Methods adaptable to visitors' geolocation and local regulations.
Optional methods configurable via Webmaster portal.
Fast, anonymous processing (few minutes).
Transparent verification methods, including double anonymity.
Strong authentication with Passkey creation.
Ready-to-use integration.
Advanced integration via Javascript API for detailed control.
Multilingual solution.
Offers visitors a choice of quick and easy verification methods.
Smooth, seamless user experience (no pop-ups, new pages, tabs).
Activation options for all pages, specific page, or user action.
Easy selection of visitor geolocation for verification.

geographical_data.regional_availability_of_methods: AgeVerif Ticket method is only available in France. Other methods adapt to visitors' geolocation and local regulations.

references.description: Detailed documentation with step-by-step guides and code examples, including advanced integration via Javascript API.
